raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "lighter box",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the left face of the lighter box. The area to the right of the lighter box is free of obstacles and the black cup is located in front of the lighter box, so lateral motion will not collide with it.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is slid ~15 cm to the right, creating a gap between the darker and lighter boxes large enough for both end-effectors to access the sides of the darker box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A clear gap exists on both the left and right sides of the darker box after Step 1, letting both arms approach laterally without interference from the lighter box, the cup, or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Both arms firmly hold the darker box from its left and right sides, lifting it a few centimetres off the tabletop. The darker box is now securely picked up by the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the left face of the lighter box. The area to the right of the lighter box is free of obstacles and the black cup is located in front of the lighter box, so lateral motion will not collide with it.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is slid ~15 cm to the right, creating a gap between the darker and lighter boxes large enough for both end-effectors to access the sides of the darker box.

parsed_json.Precondition: A clear gap exists on both the left and right sides of the darker box after Step 1, letting both arms approach laterally without interference from the lighter box, the cup, or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both arms firmly hold the darker box from its left and right sides, lifting it a few centimetres off the tabletop. The darker box is now securely picked up by the robot.
